docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITIBANK ( SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK ( SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. SERVED APR-20-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TENE, DAN
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF 1. DEFAULT JUDGMENT; 2. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS 3. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK ( SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
